subject: A large, fluffy black-and-white mountain dog standing alert on a snowy alpine ridge
description: A large, long-haired black-and-white dog stands in a confident, watchful posture on a snow-covered rocky outcrop. The dog's chest is broad and white, its coat dark across the back and shoulders, with warm russet-brown visible at the face and flanks. Its gaze is directed slightly away, alert and calm. Behind the dog, a wide alpine landscape unfolds: steep snow-capped peaks under a pale lavender-blue sky, with a warm golden-orange sunrise glow breaking at the horizon behind the mountains. The overall light is cold and crisp with the warmth of dawn just entering from the upper-right. The mood is quietly heroic — a lone guardian surveying its territory at first light.
foreground: Dog standing on snow-dusted rocky ground
background: Snow-capped alpine peaks under a lavender-blue sky with golden sunrise glow
emotion: Alert, watchful, calm — steady guardian posture
